statement.latex: The normal covering number of the symmetric group$S_n$of degree$n$is the minimum number$(S_n)$of proper subgroups$H_1, ,H_{ (S_n)}$of$S_n$such that every element of$S_n$is conjugate to an element of$H_i$, for some$i=1, , (S_n)$. Write$n=p_1^{ _1} p_r^{ _r}$for primes$p_1< <p_r$and positive integers$_1, , _r$. Conjecture\/: \[ (S_n)= \{ {lcl} {2} (1- {p_1} )&& r=1\,\, \,\, _1=1\\ {2} (1- {p_1} )+1&...
